summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio WhatsApp-only conversational travel booking agent. Backend APIs working excellently (95% success rate). All core conversation flows, state management, payment processing, and PDF ticket generation working correctly.
passed_tests: WhatsApp webhook verification with correct token returns challenge
WhatsApp webhook verification rejects wrong token
Travel request intent parsing (French) transitions to awaiting_flight_selection
Travel request intent parsing (English) transitions to awaiting_flight_selection
Flight selection with option '2' transitions to awaiting_payment_confirmation
Payment confirmation with 'oui' transitions to awaiting_momo_approval
Session management stores and retrieves user sessions correctly
Cancel command 'annuler' resets session to idle state
Complete booking flow from request to payment completion
Session automatically clears to idle after simulated payment completion
Intent parsing extracts destinations from French messages
Intent parsing extracts destinations from English messages
Conversation state machine handles all transitions correctly
MTN MoMo payment simulation with SIM- prefixed references
Background payment polling and completion processing

success_percentage.frontend: N/A - WhatsApp-only agent with no web frontend
